notes: Rendered successfully to renders/video.mp4 (~20.77s, high quality). Fixed during Step 5/6: (1) build-frame.mjs mis-picked the icon font 'eicons' instead of Mulish - corrected via Google Fonts CDN import; (2) two frame workers used ES `import` for Three.js which the runtime's template-cloning silently downgrades to a classic script, breaking `import` - fixed by loading Three.js via classic UMD `<script src>` instead; (3) Frame 5's SVG `getTotalLength()` call threw 'Illegal invocation' when called before HyperFrames connects the template into the live document - replaced with a precomputed perimeter constant, then (after that still didn't resolve a persistent WebGL crash inside three.min.js itself) replaced the whole Three.js gradient-mesh in Frame 5 with a CSS/GSAP-driven radial-gradient equivalent; (4) fixed a WCAG contrast failure on Frame 4's inactive tab label. Final lint/validate/inspect: 0 errors, 0 warnings (11 lint warnings reviewed and accepted as expected: Google Fonts CDN by design, GSAP tween-overlap false positives on distinct proxy objects). BGM is MusicGen-generated (non-commercial license) - flagged to user, needs a licensed swap before commercial ship. Copied ./renders/video.mp4 to ./output.mp4 per CLAUDE.md's required output path.
